message:
feat(http/h2): add comprehensive flow control and WINDOW_UPDATE handling

Enhance HTTP/2 connection with proper flow control implementation:

connection.rs:
- Add WINDOW_UPDATE frame processing
- Implement per-stream and connection-level flow control
- Add flow control window tracking
- Proper buffer management for data frames
- Window exhaustion handling and backpressure

stream.rs:
- Minor integration fixes for flow control

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
